# Telemedicine B2B Market Sizing

## Total Addressable Market (TAM)

The US telemedicine market is projected at $185.6 billion by 2026 (Grand View Research). B2B telemedicine (provider-to-provider) represents approximately 22% of total market volume, yielding a TAM of $40.8 billion.

## Serviceable Addressable Market (SAM)

Focusing on rural healthcare facilities (Critical Access Hospitals, Rural Health Clinics, FQHCs) reduces the addressable market to facilities in HPSAs. There are approximately 1,362 Critical Access Hospitals and 4,200+ Rural Health Clinics. At an average annual telemedicine spend of $120,000 per facility, SAM = $667 million.

## Serviceable Obtainable Market (SOM)

With a realistic 5-year target of 3% market penetration across the top 15 states with highest HPSA designations, SOM = $20 million ARR by Year 5.
